learning_objective=Check whether students can distinguish nested levels of work analysis.
learning_objective=Check recall of Taylor's canonical scientific management principles.
learning_objective=Check recall and sequencing of the DASSI process.
learning_objective=Check whether students can identify the systematic innovation methods from lecture.
learning_objective=Check whether students understand micro-level motion analysis.
learning_objective=Check system-level reasoning rather than isolated task reasoning.
learning_objective=Check whether students can explain Taylor's diagnosis of inefficiency.
learning_objective=Check whether students can place ideation tools inside a structured problem-solving process.
learning_objective=Check whether students can use innovation frameworks as a problem-solving tool, not only recite them.
learning_objective=Check whether students can move from motion diagnosis to work-system redesign.
learning_objective=Check synthesis across scientific management, work systems, and disciplined problem solving.

risks.evidence: Current run used the local deterministic fallback, not a live LLM provider.
risks.mitigation: Run the final pipeline with --provider vertex --quality final_low_cost --strict-provider or --provider vertex --quality final --strict-provider, then preserve cost_report.json as evidence.

risks.evidence: exam_blueprint.json controls the current exam draft.
risks.mitigation: Frame it as an instructor-approved blueprint or generate a fresh blueprint from the planner before final submission.

risks.evidence: Strict provider mode is off, so live provider failures can fall back during development.
The same system family generates and judges the exam.
risks.mitigation: Add human_review_notes.json and compare human findings against agentic_judge_report.json.

risks.evidence: Chunk grounding verifies lexical support, not full semantic entailment.
risks.mitigation: Upgrade SourceGroundingJudgeAgent to compare answer claims against cited chunks with a live LLM judge.

simulation.cost_note: See outputs/cost_report.json for provider usage and static token estimates.

usage_summary.note: Deterministic provider uses local static generation and makes no billable model calls.

static_cost_inputs.note: Static estimates use len(text)//4 and complement provider usage records.

golden_cases.description: A short-answer question on Taylor's four principles must surface the canonical four.
A DASSI question must reference the five-step structure.
An innovation-frameworks question should mention all five frameworks.
A motion-study question must reference Therbligs.
A work-systems question should surface multi-level vocabulary.
